svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1050" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="start" parent="1" style="ellipse;aspect=fixed;fillColor=#666666;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#000000;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="30" x="410" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="config" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="Reminder konfigurieren<div>Intervall / Schlafenszeit</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="285" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="check_due" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="Reminder<div>fällig?</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="170" x="340" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prompt" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="Erinnerung an Nutzer/in<div>anzeigen</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="295" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="decision_react" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="Nutzer/in<div>reagiert?</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="170" x="340" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ignored" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="Ignoriert<div>Status = ignored</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="70" y="445" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="confirmed" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="Bestätigt<div>Status = confirmed</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="590" y="445" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="save_event" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="Aktivität als Event erfassen<div>movement/sleep-reminder/{status}</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="320" x="265" y="585" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aggregate" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="Tagesfortschritt aktualisieren<div>DailyStatistics aggregieren</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="320" x="265" y="705" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="goal_check" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="Tagesziel /<div>Kennzahlen erreicht?</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="95" width="180" x="335" y="830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dashboard" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="Dashboard / Statistik<div>Status anzeigen</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="610" y="847" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="end" parent="1" style="ellipse;aspect=fixed;fillColor=#666666;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#000000;" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontColor=#000000;" target="config"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1"
